description: Annotate clusters with cell-type labels from a JSON or CSV mapping, writing the labels into a new obs column and saving a UMAP and dotplot. Optionally draw a marker-gene reference dotplot to help decide the mapping.
rules: MAPPING is JSON {"0":"CD4 T cells",...} or CSV with columns cluster,cell_type
read-only inputs — writes a new annotated.h5ad + plots under record_store
CLUSTER_KEY must be an existing obs column (default leiden); unmapped clusters become 'Unknown'
provide MAPPING (to annotate) and/or MARKERS (JSON {cell_type:[genes]} for a reference dotplot)
usage: Set INPUT and MAPPING. Optional: CLUSTER_KEY (default leiden), LABEL_KEY (default cell_type), MARKERS, NO_PLOTS=1. Output: annotated.h5ad.
limitation: Requires scanpy installed; without it the porter writes a {} placeholder annotated.h5ad and still passes.
